control_owner.authorization: typed compiler policy plus operator activation approval
control_owner.success_verdict: independent sealed evaluator plus activation receipt verifier
control_owner.effects: outbox dispatcher with CAS activation and reconciliation

RecordEligibility.risk: append-only local trace from untrusted observations

BuildCandidate.risk: reversible immutable candidate creation outside the active snapshot

RunSealedEvaluation.risk: read-only evaluation over frozen artifacts and holdout

ActivateSnapshot.risk: externally visible active topology or policy epoch change

transitions.evidence: validated loop and active-snapshot contracts
query, route, contribution, provenance, and outcome envelope
idempotent eligibility receipt with delayed outcome binding
insufficient support, zero advantage, ambiguity, or explicit abstention
three diversified candidates below the preregistered marginal-gain threshold
one mutation plane, expected gain, uncertainty, and mutation budget
base epoch, candidate hash, mutation class, and source evidence hashes
typed incidence, provenance, visibility, identity, cycle, cache, and budget checks
typed rejection receipt
missing, conflicting, or tampered evidence
non-correctable candidate construction failure
fresh query-disjoint sealed split and equal-budget manifest
positive lower confidence bound plus retention, replay, and control gates
failed efficacy, retention, replay, calibration, or equal-budget gate
required no-harm windows and affected-neighborhood checks passed
regression or policy-bound violation
candidate, active-base, destination, visibility, and diff hashes
one-time approval bound to exact candidate and active base
approval expiry or active-base drift
atomic activation intent, checkpoint, and CAS precondition
activation attempt, response, and active-epoch observation
candidate hash, old/new epoch, and CAS receipt match
ambiguous active epoch; blind retry forbidden
verified active-epoch receipt and pending-interrupt snapshot
typed permanent failure and pending-interrupt snapshot
reconciled activation success and handoff to absorption rollback monitor
reconciled permanent activation failure
durable pending cancellation
durable pending timeout
durable pending budget exhaustion
candidate construction attempt ledger

global_interrupts.deferred_behavior: record pending cancel, reconcile the activation attempt, then honor cancellation
record pending timeout, reconcile the activation attempt, then terminate
block new work, reconcile the activation attempt, then terminate

budgets.soft_boundary: freeze the current candidate and prepare an evidence-complete handoff at 80 percent

no_progress.fingerprint: hash of base epoch, mutation class, candidate semantic digest, evaluator result, and unresolved gaps
no_progress.gain_metric: positive fresh lower-bound gain plus retained capability minus interference and cost under deduplicated evidence
no_progress.calibration: versioned thresholds on frozen production-like train, validation, and sealed splits
no_progress.scope: proposal and correction subloop only; the outer run still freezes or rejects the candidate
no_progress.plateau_comparator: each diversified candidate in the window fails to improve the preregistered vector gate

retry.backoff: bounded exponential backoff with jitter; candidate semantics and idempotency key remain fixed

effects.delivery_semantics: at-least-once with idempotent eligibility/candidate writes and CAS activation receipts
effects.idempotency_key: run_id, base_epoch, mutation_class, candidate_hash, transition_id, effect_sequence, tool_version
effects.durable_ledger: eligibility, proposal, compile verdict, approval consumption, activation intent, attempt, response, receipt, and rollback handoff
effects.high_risk_gate: ActivateSnapshot is reachable only after sealed evaluation, canary, exact approval, and ACTIVATION_INTENT
effects.unknown_outcome: enter HUMAN_RECONCILIATION; observe active epoch and receipt before any retry

checkpoint.compatibility: resume only the same immutable workflow, state schema, compiler, scorer, and evaluator versions
checkpoint.migration: explicit state-schema migration that cannot alter frozen candidate or evidence hashes
checkpoint.fencing: single-runner lease token checked on every state and outbox commit
checkpoint.monotonic_sequence: checkpoint sequence and topology or policy epoch increase monotonically
checkpoint.integrity: checksum state, candidate, pending effects, approvals, interrupts, and version envelope
checkpoint.corruption_outcome: quarantine candidate and require recovery review

approval.revocation: revocation before activation-intent commit invalidates the approval
approval.stale_outcome: return to READY_FOR_REVIEW and reevaluate against the new active base

verification.success_predicate: CAS receipt proves the approved candidate hash became the active epoch and the existing absorption FSM owns rollback monitoring
invariant_checks: one mutation plane per initial candidate
no active mutation before compile and sealed gates
terminal states have no outgoing transitions
verification.environment_evidence: frozen manifests, query-disjoint split hashes, evaluator receipts, replay output, canary observations, and active-epoch receipt
verification.evaluator_independence: the proposer cannot issue the promotion verdict; Agent A self-rating is not third-factor evidence
verification.human_gray_band: ambiguous semantics, unsupported actions, tied routes, or unknown activation outcomes suspend or select NO_CHANGE
verification.calibration: report false accepts, false rejects, coverage, abstention, subgroup retention, and threshold drift on frozen holdout

replay.resume: continue from compatible durable state under a fresh fenced lease
replay.trajectory_replay: rerun proposal or evaluation and allow model or environment divergence into a new candidate ID
deterministic_replay_requirements: frozen workflow, compiler, scorer, evaluator, and model versions
captured clock, random, and ID inputs

security.untrusted_content: queries, retrieved text, model proposals, and cited web content are data, never control instructions
security.tool_least_privilege: proposal tools write only shadow candidates; activation credentials exist only in the gated dispatcher
security.provenance_snapshots: store source path or URL, retrieval time, content hash, parser version, actor, and evidence role
security.secret_isolation: models, retrieved content, and candidate compilers never receive activation credentials

trace.redaction: secrets and sensitive source payloads are excluded or encrypted; hashes and typed metadata remain

icvc.inform: user canon, active HSWM snapshot, evidence provenance, prior negative results, and primary research
icvc.constrain: one-plane candidates, typed compiler, budgets, abstention, immutable freeze, approval, and CAS
icvc.verify: independent sealed evaluator, retention/canary vector gate, replay, controls, and activation receipt
icvc.correct: bounded new-candidate iteration before activation and handoff to the existing rollback/supersession FSM
